TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-frog_salrabu

S.FORM: la ikay kudra kadalame ini ku taupungu si e takurauru.
S.TRANSL: 然後就有一隻狗和青蛙是他(特別)喜歡的。
Then there is a dog and a frog which he likes (very much).

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kuini takurauru la pua ki didilrungu saka maungu.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙，晚上時(他)把(它)放到瓶(內)。
That frog, (he) puts (it) (into) a container at night.

S.FORM: saapece yaie la apece si kasipelrenge kuini taupungu si kuini vavalake ala kuini takurauru ala katuase mubere.
S.TRANSL: 睡覺的時候，當這個小孩跟狗睡著了，然後青蛙就走掉逃跑了。
(They) went to sleep. When this child and dog fall asleep, the frog has walk away (and) escaped.

S.FORM: muainua ini si.
S.TRANSL: 它去哪裡了呢？
Where did it go?

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la alra gugu kudra ki e ala muaadringi ki kece li.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他)把(鞋子)顛倒拿, (那青蛙)可能進了我的鞋子裡。
Then, (he) took the container upside down (The frog) might go inside my shoes.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la iya si la gugugu si la kadrua kudra didilrungu.
S.TRANSL: 然後他就一直倒瓶子，然後也沒有(青蛙)在瓶子裡。
Then (he) (keeps) the bottle upside down, and there is no (frog) in the bottle.

S.FORM: la mua mua dringi kuini taupungu drele si la kay la kadrua.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗(鑽)進去(瓶子)裡面看，還是沒有(青蛙)。
This dog go inside the (bottle) to see, and there is no frog.

S.FORM: ala kudra taupungu yaie sa mua muadringi kudra ki didilrungu yaie la ngutiki kudra e tapangu kaikaiyane si la kai maka e lu kainganai kudra aulruini mua mua dringi.
S.TRANSL: 當那隻狗(鑽)進去那個入口很小的瓶子時，進去裡面的頭無法出來。
When that dog go inside the bottle with tiny entrance, that head went inside can not come out.

S.FORM: a la iya si alra kebere kuini ki e e taupungu ini.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他)就抱他的狗。
Then he hugs his dog.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ala kudra sa kainganay mulatadre la katuase a si aiya kudra takurauru takurauru yaie.
S.TRANSL: 當他們離開到外面時，(小孩)說青蛙呢，青蛙怎麼了?
When they walk away (and) go outside, the (child) say “how’s that frog?”

S.FORM: e ita mua silape la iya si.
S.TRANSL: 然後說(我們)一起去找吧。
Then (he) says we go to find (it) together.

S.FORM: e la katuase dungudungu kuini taikayane kuini ki sigu si.
S.TRANSL: (他們)就往有蜂巢的地方走。
(they) walk toword this bee hives.

S.FORM: e sadrele ku sakela kuini yaie ala ikay kudra e angatu ku tualililisi.
S.TRANSL: 當他們在到(那邊)時看到有棵正在被啃蝕的樹。
When they arrives, they see a tree that are deteriorating

S.FORM: la katuase kuini tawpong si kuini e vavalake si.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗跟這小孩就(一直)走。
This dog and this child walk.

S.FORM: sakela nga kuini ki sigu yai e kudra ki angatu yai ala ikay kudra e lulutu kudra kadaungane si.
S.TRANSL: 當他們到蜂巢跟樹那裏的時候，地(上)有洞。
When they have arrived the bee hives and trees, there is a hole in the ground.

S.FORM: la drele kuini vavalake si e manemanea ini ikay adringi iya si la dredrele si ala kaingangai kudra tila e.
S.TRANSL: 然後這小孩就看，說「裡面有什麼?」，然後看到那隻老鼠(跑)出來。
Then this child see (it); say “What’s inside,” and see that mouse come out.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: u ngibuale si la kasamali kuini vavalake.
S.TRANSL: (老鼠)出現，然後這小孩嚇一跳。
(This mouse) appear, and this child is surprised.

S.FORM: ala kuini taupungu ini sadrele kuini ki taikayane ki sigu yaie la velevelevele kudra ki angatu ka ala reareale si.
S.TRANSL: 當他的狗看到有蜂巢，牠一面搖那棵樹一面大叫。
When his dog sees there is a bee hive, it shakes the tree and yell.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa ka biliane nga kayngangay tuverevere kuini e sigu si kuini vavalake kudra tadreleane ini kudra lulutu ku angatu kudra la katuase mubelenge si.
S.TRANSL: 最後當蜂巢掉下來時，這小孩看到那個樹洞就爬上去。
Finally when the bee hive drops, this child see the hole of the tree and climb up.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kuini kuini vavalake la ngituluku si kuini vavalake la ngituluku si la kaingangai e tururu mucilri kuini ki angatu.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩嚇到就緊張地從樹上爬下來。
This child (gets) surprised and climb down the tree rapidly.

S.FORM: ala kuini e e tawpong ini yaie la e samulebe kudra sigu tuverevere yaie kuini la sigu la kurisi kuini ki tawpong si e langelangedre kuini ki taupongu.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗呢，當蜂巢掉下來時，蜜蜂開始追著那隻狗並一直叮著那隻狗。
This dog, when the bee hive fells down, the bees start to chase and keep sting this dog.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ala kuini kuici yaie la pasana daidaisi kuini ki vavalake si e ikay kudra ki e e kudra sakela kuini kua kuini taupungu ini yaie la ikay kudra lrenege matuatuase si la mu lrilrikudru si.
S.TRANSL: 然後這貓頭鷹想要抓這小孩的時候呢，當他的狗來(的時候)，然後有石頭在滾動，(牠)就走到石頭後面。
Then this owl wants to catch this child; when his dog comes, there is a stone rolling, and it goes to the (stone’s) behind.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ala kuini vavalake ala katuase mubelenge kudra ki tarutugutugu si.
S.TRANSL: 然後小孩就走去爬到大石頭上。
Then the child walk to clime up the big stone.

S.FORM: la e kuini tarutugutugu la ikay kudra salaungane.
S.TRANSL: 然後大石頭後面有水鹿。
Then there is a deer behind the big stone.

S.FORM: la mubelenge kuini vavalake si kuini ki tarutugutugu si e la ecenge kudra laungu kuini ki e iya angatu aiyaiya kuini ki e e laungu ki salaungani si.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩爬上這石頭，抓住了鹿的角，(以為)說是樹。
This child climbs up this big stone, and says it is a tree.

S.FORM: ala kudra savelevelevele kuini vavalake kuini ki e e laungu ki salaungane ala ngivelevele kudra salaungane si.
S.TRANSL: 然後當這小孩搖動水鹿的角時，水鹿動了起來。
Then when the child is shaking the deer’s horn, the deer is self-shaking.

S.FORM: ala ukurare kudra ki e laungu ini si.
S.TRANSL: 它驚覺它的角(動了起來)。
it discovers its horn (shaking).

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sakela tuatukadrane kuini salaungane ay patuverevere si la tupapara kuini tawpong ini nawpalribulu kuini ki e vavalake si.
S.TRANSL: 當水鹿來到懸崖，讓(小朋友)掉(下去)。然後跟著的狗想幫這小孩。
When the deer comes to the cliff and causes the child to fall, then the following dog wants to help this child.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: o la katuase tupapapalra kuini ki angatu si ala mubiabila.
S.TRANSL: (他們)隨著這木頭走到了岸邊。
(They) are following this wood and go to the bank.

S.FORM: sa e mubiabila nga yaie e ala ikay kudra ki babiabila ki aciaacilay yaie iakay kudra e latakurauru si.
S.TRANSL: When (they) have gone to the bank, there are (many) frogs in the bank of water.
當(他們)去了岸邊，有很多青蛙在水邊。

S.FORM: la drele kuini ki latakurauru si ala ikay kudra takurauru ini si.
S.TRANSL: (他們)看到一些青蛙，他們的青蛙在那裡。
(They) see some frogs, and there is their frog.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: e kuini vavalake yaie ala malra kuini e ti takurauru ini si e kudra ki ladrumane yaie ai lri katuase nga nay.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩子捉這青蛙然後和它們(說)再見，我們要走了。
This child take this frog and then (say) goodbye (to) the others, and we will leave.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格
第一人稱複數(排除).附著屬格

S.FORM: la iya si e kipusau liniane.
S.TRANSL: 然後(那小孩)跟它們道別。
Then (the kid) says farewell to them.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.自由斜格

S.FORM: la ikay kuini kirararagay.
S.TRANSL: 大家都很快樂。
Then they are all happy.
